name: Paparazzi / Papachinos
deal: Half-price pizza and pasta every Monday — all mains at 50% off when you dine in
howToClaim: Visit any Papachinos branch on a Monday. No voucher needed — discount applies automatically at the till

name: Spur
deal: Kids eat free on Sundays — one free kids meal per paying adult with the Spur Family Card
howToClaim: Register a Spur Family Card at your nearest Spur or online. Present card at checkout on Sundays

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Epic Catch: Sushi 11 + Soda Combo — 11 pieces of fresh assorted sushi served with a refreshing soda for R99
howToClaim: Order the Sushi 11 Epic Catch combo from the specials menu for sit-down or takeaway

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Epic Catch: Sushi 16 — A generous 16-piece sushi platter built for hearty appetites for R125
howToClaim: Ask for the Epic Catch Sushi 16 platter at any participating branch nationwide

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Epic Catch: Seafood Burger + Soda — Crispy seafood patty tucked into a soft bun, served with a side of chips and a soda for R99
howToClaim: Select your choice of seafood burger from the Epic Catch promotional menu tier

name: Ocean Basket
deal: Epic Catch: Oceans Platter — A greatest-hits solo plate featuring classic fish, prawns, and signature sides for R145
howToClaim: Order the solo Oceans Platter from the limited-time Epic Catch menu

name: Primi Piatti
deal: Happy Hour drinks at 50% off, plus complimentary olives and bread for the table before 6:30pm
howToClaim: Arrive before 18:30 on weeknights. Happy Hour pricing applies automatically at the bar

name: Spur
deal: Classic Monday Burger Special — buy any single original Spur Burger (Beef, Chicken, Soya, or Rib) and get another one free
howToClaim: Visit any Spur on a Monday for sit-down dining. The cheaper burger of the two is free automatically

name: Spur
deal: Unreal Breakfast — get 2 fried eggs, 2 rashers of grilled bacon, 1 pork sausage, fried tomato, and toast for under R50
howToClaim: Order before 11:00 AM daily at any Spur branch. Available for sit-down only

name: Panarottis
deal: Big Monday Pizza Special — buy any standard pizza or pasta and get another one free
howToClaim: Dine in at any Panarottis on a Monday. Buy one pizza or pasta and the second one is free automatically

name: Panarottis
deal: Thursday Pizza Night — Eat-As-Much-As-You-Can pizza slices for a fixed price per person
howToClaim: Visit any Panarottis on a Thursday from 16:00. Pay the fixed per-person rate for continuous pizza slice rotations

name: John Dory's
deal: Half-Price Sushi Wednesdays — 50% off all single sushi plates and platters all day
howToClaim: Visit any John Dory's branch on a Wednesday for sit-down dining. Discount applies to all single plates at checkout
